svg.text: Reflexes live on the aircraft. Language, vision and orchestration live on Qwen Cloud. Deterministic safety gates sit between them.
native audio in → reasoning → native audio out — no ASR stage
manual PTT turns (turn_detection: null) · barge-in cancel
open-vocabulary target grounding — seeds the onboard tracker
satellite-tile parcel detection for the survey planner
post-flight mission reports: recorder stats, mode timeline,
Caddy sidecar — automatic HTTPS, Let’s Encrypt :443
one container: GCS backend + dual PX4 SITL + Gazebo
The browser talks HTTPS / WSS straight to this box. In the public
demo, the whole GROUND column and the simulated EDGE column
(dashed, far right) run inside this one container —
live tactical map · dual drone HUDs · dual video feeds
survey previews · conversation log · Ready-for-Flight pill
a human arms Ready-for-Flight here — operator stays in the loop
session mgmt · injects [SYSTEM] events → proactive speech
the same 38 tools serve voice, REST and the field system
▪ max-alt ceiling — refuse, never clamp · spoken override
▪ home-alt gate — no takeoff on bad EKF / home altitude
per-vehicle links · sysid routing · telemetry ingest @ 4 Hz
FastAPI, field-flown — the same backend flies the physical fleet
modes · EKF · mixing — flies itself; the GCS sends intents
RTSP video · gimbal point / tilt / zoom
datalink: SIYI smart controller — MAVLink + video share one link
GPS-denied state estimation, fused into PX4 EKF
follows targets through link dropouts — no cloud in the loop
flight control · failsafes stay authoritative onboard
SIM ↔ REAL — INTERCHANGEABLE AT THIS LINE
dual PX4 SITL + Gazebo — one gz world per drone, own GZ_PARTITION
lives inside the ECS container · same MAVLink, same tools, same gates
everything outside this column is byte-identical in the field
wss Qwen Realtime — PCM16 up · commit on release
voice command path — ① PTT … ⑦ spoken outcome
Qwen Cloud · Alibaba ECS · PX4 · MAVLink · WebRTC
